channel.title: 电信 on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in 电信 on Margrop Blog

item.title: Use of Telecom Optical Cat HGU421N_V3
item.description: Note: Ethernet port 4: 1000Mb/s, others 10/100Mb/s Password of TTY might NOT be 以用户名：admin，密码：v2mprt 登录 Any powerful Route compatible with ChinaTelecom EPON and has 2 1000Mb/s ports at least? e8-C Terminal User Manual: Product technical specifications: Huaqin HGU421N v3.0 broadband modem crack: pplc #1 Old 2015-01-02, 17:39:43 Default new version of Huaqin HGU421N V3 optical cat crack Recently, I found some old version of HGU421N V3 cracking information on the Internet, and based on the reference, I cracked the new version of HGU421N V3, and it also has IPTV on it.
